evidence_ref: FusionHero: src/utils/visual/polar.test.ts (7) + tensionFieldVisual.test.ts (5) + tests/e2e/landing-redesign.spec.ts (hero visible, one tension+question, demo-labelled, NO % , kein-Urteil headline)
micro-experience: src/utils/visual/microExperience.test.ts (3) + tests/e2e/landing-redesign.spec.ts (start→question→react→note+CTA, demo, no identity claim)
visible-engine bento: src/components/landing/engineBento.test.ts (3) + tests/e2e/landing-redesign.spec.ts (engine-bento + 6 engine-card, no metric/score)
fusion-path + premium bridge: tests/e2e/landing-redesign.spec.ts (fusion-path + premium-bridge visible); premium = explanation/history/export, not truth (trustContent)

additive architecture: App.tsx activeTab='landing' before untouched InputForm; CTA→input; no router; all 7 form-first e2e specs traverse the landing and still pass (full Playwright 41+ green), proving the entry/auth spine intact
reuse: FusionHero imports ELEMENT_AXIS_MAP + re-housed polar/curvePath/blend (polar.test.ts pins to TensionNavigator originals); no new FuFirE endpoint; landing is static/demo, no engine call

anti-reification: src/__tests__/redesignWording.test.ts scans non-boundary copy + comment-stripped landing chrome for positive reification (none) + confirms boundaries name the refusals; e2e rendered-DOM scan on landing-page (no du-bist/garantiert/beweist/zukunft-voraus)
prefers-reduced-motion: global @media rule in index.css; tests/e2e/landing-redesign.spec.ts emulateMedia reduced → hero still renders, no animated-background crash
